summary: The diff implements REQ-2 (color retheme) and REQ-3 (ServicesGallery data update) comprehensively. REQ-1 is partially addressed: the code references the generated banner images and the Services section uses SVG hand-pentacle illustrations as decorative elements on cards, but the actual generated PNG image files are not present in the diff as added files — they are referenced but not shown as created assets.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate polished service card banner images for each service category and save them as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/; display them in the Services section as the visual header/illustration for each service package card.
missing_requirements.reason: No image files were added under frontend/public/assets/generated/ (the diff shows 0 added files). The Services section (Services.tsx) uses SVG hand-pentacle illustrations instead of the generated PNG banner images. The ServicesGallery references the correct paths but the actual banner PNG files (service-mini-readings-banner.dim_800x500.png, service-love-relationship-banner.dim_800x500.png, etc.) are not present as added files. Additionally, the Services section cards do not display the banner images as visual headers — they use inline SVG illustrations instead.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode CSS variable overrides were added in index.css (.dark block), which was not requested.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for a light blue-crystal-moon palette retheme; no dark mode support was requested.
